findings.message: The bag-drop status contract is still inconsistent and too weak. TASK-02 says TC-08 should explicitly assert that activity code "23" collapses to status "1", but TASK-05 later downgrades the same case to it.skip. More importantly, the live type/color system already supports "23" in MyLocalStatus.ts and statusColors, while the omission lives in the same file this plan is already editing at useGridData.ts:172. Shipping a new staff panel with a known wrong status and memorializing it with a skipped test is not a solid execution contract.

TASK-02 still has no deterministic sort for unallocatedOccupants. The planned memo iterates raw Object.entries(bookingsData) and returns the collected array directly, while the existing room-row path deliberately normalizes order via sortByDateAsc in useGridData.ts:113. Without an explicit sort key, panel order and RTL assertions will depend on Firebase insertion order.

The scout note still says hasBookingDateRange is 'already exported' from useGridData.ts, but the helper is file-local today at useGridData.ts:39. This does not block the task because the new memo lives in the same module.
